title: Sabo Reveals the Truth of the Levely
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Dragon as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: present day, the Holy Land of Mariejois

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A celestial dragon has just been sentenced to death.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The judge was the former King of the Land Known as God Valley!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, this information will never be reported to the outside world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He currently serves as the Supreme Commander of God's Knights.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: His name is Saint Garling Figarland.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The man he sentenced to execution? None other than the one who chose to defend Fishmen...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A man who can even judge the celestial dragons?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...is lower than the scum they protect!!

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 15 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
